papers.title: Efficient Chain-of-Modality Reasoning via Progressive Compression for Spoken Language Models
papers.abstract: The first framework to introduce compressed reasoning into spoken language models (SLMs). By compressing textual reasoning traces to jointly serve as speech guidance and reasoning representation, ECoM Reasoning improves spoken math QA accuracy by 21% over standard CoM without explicit reasoning, and 3% over CoM with full traces while using only 40% of text tokens.
papers.highlight: 🧠 首个将压缩推理引入口语语言模型的框架：仅用40%文本token，准确率超全量推理3%

papers.title: StellarTTS: Sparse Temporal Embedding for Low-Latency and Robust Speech Synthesis
papers.abstract: A mobile-optimized non-autoregressive TTS framework using sparse temporal embedding for granular control of phoneme duration, pronunciation, and prosody. Features a semantic-aware codec for single-stage decoding. The 83M-parameter lightweight masked generative transformer achieves RTF 0.08 with superior robustness and competitive audio quality. Accepted at ASRU 2025.
papers.highlight: 📱 移动端优化TTS：83M参数，RTF 0.08，稀疏时序嵌入实现低延迟高鲁棒语音合成

papers.title: Data-Efficient Streaming Speech-to-Speech Translation via Explicit Trajectory Supervision
papers.abstract: Streaming S2ST using only ~2k hours of paired cross-lingual data with auxiliary multitask training. Core contribution: joint text-code trajectory supervision that unifies target text and acoustic semantic codes as a single commitment path. A two-stream Thinker-Talker factorization decouples linguistic reasoning from acoustic prediction, matching closed-source systems like LiveInterpret 2.0 on ASR-BLEU.
papers.highlight: 🌐 仅2k小时数据实现流式语音翻译，Thinker-Talker双流架构媲美商业S2ST系统

papers.title: Audio-Zero: Label-Free Self-Evolution for Fine-Grained Audio Reasoning
papers.abstract: The first label-free self-evolution framework for Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) that improves fine-grained auditory perception. Constructs an auditory self-play game from unlabeled audio contrast pairs where models generate clues and identify odd listeners. Verified on Qwen2-Audio-7B-Instruct and Qwen2.5-Omni-7B on TREA, MMAU, and MMAR benchmarks.
papers.highlight: 🎮 首个无标签自进化音频推理框架：通过听觉自博弈游戏，无需标注即可提升细粒度感知

papers.title: Layer-Wise Decision Fusion for Fake Audio Detection Using XLS-R
papers.abstract: A layer-wise decision fusion method for fake audio detection that fuses after per-layer decision making rather than fusing features first. Achieves best cross-dataset EER 6.90% on In-the-Wild dataset compared to strong baselines. The transparent design enables detailed analysis of decision mechanisms. Accepted at Interspeech 2025.
papers.highlight: 🔒 层级决策融合假音频检测：In-the-Wild数据集EER 6.90%，可解释性强

papers.title: Pushing the Frontier of Full-Song Generation: Hierarchical Autoregressive Planning Meets Flow-Matching Rendering
papers.authors: Junyu Dai, Xinyue Fan, Weiqin Li et al.
papers.abstract: A unified song generation framework for lyrics-to-song, instrumental music, and cover song generation. Four-component architecture: semantic-aware tokenizer, hybird-LM, FullDiT, and melody module. Uses hierarchical autoregressive modeling combined with flow-matching rendering. Investigates DPO, GRPO, and OPD as reward-based post-training strategies.
papers.highlight: 🎵 全曲生成新框架：层级自回归规划+流匹配渲染，覆盖作词作曲到翻唱三任务

papers.title: Scalable Keyword Spotting via Modular Network Expansion
papers.abstract: Parameter-capped modular expansion for keyword spotting on embedded devices. Freezes the base network and trains only a lightweight expansion branch for new keywords. Reduces average new-keyword FRR from 6.46 to 4.37 vs parameter-matched baseline, using fewer MACs (16.34M vs 18.45M). Accepted at Interspeech 2026.
papers.highlight: 🎯 Interspeech 2026：嵌入式设备关键词识别增量更新，10k参数扩展即达SOTA
